summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Phase 5 Australia Map implementation. Successfully verified Australia-focused map replaces 3D globe as default view, state impact heatmap, location markers, macro badges, and view toggle functionality.

design_issues.issue: Could not detect exact '0.6s ease' transition specification in computed styles during testing

passed_tests: AustraliaMap component renders with D3 + GeoJSON
8 Australian state boundaries display with blue outlines
All 6 location markers present (Port Hedland, Pilbara, Gladstone, Darwin, Sydney, Kalgoorlie)
Port Hedland marker shows congestion badge (HIGH/14 vessels)
View toggle button works perfectly (Australia ↔ Global)
Default view is Australia map (not globe)
State impact heatmap - clicking events colors affected states correctly
Multiple states colored with proper opacity (WA: #ff4444/0.45, QLD: #ff8844/0.25, NT: #ff6644/0.35)
3 floating macro badges positioned over geography (Iron Ore, AUD/USD, ASX 200)
Macro badges pull live data from /api/data/macro-context
All P0-P3 features still working (macro strip, ticker, heatmap, history)
Map fills center panel properly (1240px width)
Smooth navigation between Australia and Global views
